gettingStarted.q1: How do I set up my profile?
gettingStarted.a1: Go to the Profil tab and tap on any field to edit your information. You can add your photo, update contact details, and set your availability preferences.
gettingStarted.q2: How do I navigate the app?
gettingStarted.a2: Use the bottom navigation bar to switch between Id-Dar, Skeda, Tasks, and Profil. The Id-Dar screen shows your daily overview, upcoming xiftijiet, and quick actions.
gettingStarted.a3: Go to Profil > Settings > Notifiki to customize which alerts you receive. We recommend enabling xift reminders and skeda change notifications.

schedule.q1: How do I view my upcoming xiftijiet?
schedule.a1: Miftuħ the Skeda tab to see your weekly skeda. Tap on any xift to view details including location, role, and any special instructions.
schedule.q2: How do I request a xift swap?
schedule.a2: Tap on the xift you want to swap, then select "Talba Bidla". Agħżel an available colleague and submit the request. You'll be notified when they respond.
schedule.q3: How do I request time off?
schedule.a3: Minn the Skeda tab, tap the "+" button and select "Talba Ħin Off". Agħżel your dates, add a reason, and submit. Your manager will review and approva or deny the request.

timeTracking.q1: How do I irregistra d-dhul and out?
timeTracking.a1: On your xift jum, the Irregistra d-dhul button appears on the Id-Dar screen. Tap it when you arrive at work. The button changes to Irregistra l-hrug when your xift is active.
timeTracking.q2: What if I forget to clock out?
timeTracking.a2: Ikkuntattja lill-maniġer tiegħek as soon as possible. They can manually adjust your time records. You can also add a note explaining the missed clock-out in the Skeda tab.
timeTracking.a3: Your sigħat are calculated from clock-in to clock-out, minus any scheduled breaks. Overtime is automatically tracked based on your contract and local labor laws.

tasks.q1: How do I view my assigned tasks?
tasks.a1: Miftuħ the Tasks tab to see all your pending, in-progress, and completed tasks. Tasks are sorted by priority and due date.
tasks.q2: How do I complete a task?
tasks.a2: Tap on a task to view its details and requirements. Once completed, tap "Mark Complete" and add any required photos or notes for verification.
tasks.q3: Can I add my own tasks?
tasks.a3: Iva! Tap the "+" button in the Tasks tab to create a personal task. You can set reminders, priority levels, and due dates for your own to-do items.

career.q1: How do I track my career progress?
career.a1: Go to Karriera from the Id-Dar screen to see your current role, skills progress, and available advancement paths. Complete training modules to unlock new opportunities.
career.a2: Ċertifikazzjonijiet are earned by completing specific training modules and skill assessments. Check the Ħiliet tab to see available certifications and your progress.
career.q3: How do I apply for internal positions?
career.a3: Miftuħ job postings from the Karriera section. If you meet the requirements, tap "Applika" and submit your application. Your manager will be notified.

rewards.q1: How do I earn momentum points?
rewards.a1: Earn points by completing tasks on time, maintaining good attendance, receiving recognition, and achieving performance goals. Punti are awarded automatically.
rewards.q2: How do I redeem my rewards?
rewards.a2: Go to the Rewards section to browse available rewards. Tap on any item to see the point cost, then tap "Redeem" if you have enough points.
rewards.a3: Punti remain valid for 12 xhur from the date earned. Check your Rewards history to see when points were earned and their expiration dates.
